authors.author: Israel Houghton
Israel Houghton
Mit dir kommt der Himmel zu mir

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who is like You Lord in all the earth Matchless love and beauty, endless worth Nothing in this world will satisfy Jesus You're the cup that won't run dry

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your presence is Heaven to me Your presence is Heaven to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Treasure of my heart and of my soul In my weakness You are merciful Redeemer of my past and present wrongs Holder of my future days to come

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Your presence is Heaven to me Your presence is Heaven to me Your presence is Heaven to me Your presence is Heaven to me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh Jesus, oh Jesus Your presence is Heaven to me Oh Jesus, oh Jesus Your presence is Heaven to me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All my days on earth I will await The moment that I see You face to face Nothing in this world will satisfy 'Cause Jesus You're the cup that won't run dry Nothing in this world will satisfy Jesus You're the cup that won't run dry Jesus You're the cup that won't run dry

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Your presence is Heaven to me Your presence is Heaven to me Your presence is Heaven to me Your presence is Heaven to me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh Jesus, oh Jesus Your presence is Heaven to me Oh Jesus, oh Jesus Your presence is Heaven to me
